brand_identity.name: Nebula Library
core_values: Visual Immersion First (Cover Art is Hero)
Context-Aware Aesthetics (Themes that change the feeling)

typography.installation: import '@fontsource/outfit'; import '@fontsource/manrope'; // Add to main entry file

layout_strategy.grid_system: The Bento Grid - Adapted for Portals
layout_strategy.game_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-6 md:gap-8

GameCard.interaction: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl transition-all duration-500 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_-10px_rgba(var(--primary),0.6)] hover:z-10
GameCard.image_style: object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-110
GameCard.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-background via-background/20 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex flex-col justify-end p-4
GameCard.title: font-bold text-lg md:text-xl text-white translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300
GameCard.tags: flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2 translate-y-4 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300 delay-75

FilterBar.wrapper: flex items-center gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-4 no-scrollbar mask-linear-fade
FilterBar.item: px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-medium border border-border/50 bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer whitespace-nowrap active:scale-95

AddGameModal.style: bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-xl border border-border shadow-2xl sm:max-w-[600px]
AddGameModal.input: h-14 text-lg bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary/50 focus:bg-secondary transition-all

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: `yarn add framer-motion @fontsource/outfit @fontsource/manrope clsx tailwind-merge`
THEME IMPLEMENTATION: Use CSS variables in `index.css` but scope them under data-theme attributes on the `html` or `body` tag to allow instant switching.
GLASSMORPHISM: Apply `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)` heavily on the Navbar and Modals.
GRID LOGIC: Implement the 'Bento Grid' philosophy. Not just equal squares—allow 'Featured' games to span 2 cols or 2 rows if possible, or stick to a highly responsive masonry-like dense grid.
HOVER STATES: The game cards must feel 'alive'. Use the `group` class in Tailwind to trigger child animations on parent hover.
NO DEFAULT SCROLLBARS: Hide scrollbars in the category filter list using `no-scrollbar` utility class.
DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (Game Card, Filter Button, Add Button, Theme Toggle) has a unique `data-testid`.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Do not center align the app container.
Use modern button styles (pill or sharp).
Never use AI emojis as icons.
